verdict: The chart captures the song's structure and energy well, but violates standard single-play design conventions with an illegal 3-panel hold and excessive difficulty spikes for a Medium rating.

issues.problem: Illegal 3-panel hold (D, U, and L held simultaneously) which requires hands or complex bracket-pressing, violating single-play pad guidelines, especially on Medium.
A continuous 10-second eighth-note stream featuring frequent jumps is too physically demanding and complex for a 'Medium' difficulty, causing a severe pacing and difficulty spike.
An awkward sixteenth-note tap leading directly into an eighth-note jump (JUMP LR) which is mechanically jarring and too advanced for this difficulty tier.
Rhythmically complex sixteenth-note tap occurring during an active hold, ending with a simultaneous release/tap, which is highly unintuitive for Medium-level players.
